nasb.text: “As for Me, behold, My covenant is with you, And you will be the father of a multitude of nations.

esv.text: “Behold, my covenant is with you, and you shall be the father of a multitude of nations.

cnv.text: “看哪，這就是我和你所立的約： 你要作多國的父。

ccb.text: “我要与你立约，你必成为许多民族的始祖。

csbs.text: “看哪，我的约是与你立的，你将成为多国之父！
